description.value: Price 3,000 gp; Slot hands; CL 5th Weight â; Aura faint divination APPEARANCE These gloves grant their wearer powerful skills in the arts of healingâand harmingâliving beings. EFFECTS The wearer of a pair of healer’s gloves gains a +4 competence bonus on Heal checks to provide first aid, long-term care, and to treat deadly wounds for living, humanoid creatures. In addition, the wearer gains a +2 competence bonus on rolls to confirm critical hits with unarmed strikes or with natural weapons against living humanoid creatures. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,500 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells status, true strike; Special creator must have 5 ranks in Heal
